chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2242 of 2021 CP D 2243 of 2021 CP D 2244 of 2021 CP D 2245 of 2021 CP D 2246 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.9578/2021 2. For hearing of main case 21.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Silat, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Demand notices have been impugned in these petitions which in the opinion of the petitioner’s learned counsel have been issued unwarranted. Be that as it may, learned counsel for respondent submits upon instructions that the impugned notices are being withdrawn forthwith subject to the right of respondent department to initiate proceedings as may be permissible under the law. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitions have served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
